item.title: Sweet Summer Watermelon In All Its Glory
item.description: A simple celebration of watermelon at its sweetest and most refreshing, with a bright, juicy feel that’s perfect for summer.

media:content.media:title: Sweet Summer Watermelon In All Its Glory
media:content.media:description: A simple celebration of watermelon at its sweetest and most refreshing, with a bright, juicy feel that’s perfect for summer.

item.title: Cooking Like The Old Days
item.description: I found a 63-year old Easy Bake Oven at the flea market, so let try cooking with it.

media:content.media:title: Cooking Like The Old Days
media:content.media:description: I found a 63-year old Easy Bake Oven at the flea market, so let try cooking with it.
